violations.text: Cases of food and beverages were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage and walk-in freezer areas. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Staff were processing the delivery (received 3/16) at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC informed inspector the ice is not used in food. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
Faucets at 3-bay sink and prep sink observed leaking. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024
Hot box door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
Leaks were observed at the faucets of the 3-bay sink and the prep sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024
Leaks were observed at the faucets of the 3-bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024
Two lights were observed non-functional on the ventilation hoods. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

Self-serve/grab-n-go items packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
Cases of food were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
Hot box gaskets were observed with tears. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
Inspector observed a faucet leak at the 3-bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024
The dumpster/compactor was not closed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
The plumbing to the 3 bay sink in the kitchen was observed in poor repair. Leak observed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024

The prep sink in kitchen area is in poor repair (pipes not aligned with gap causing water to spill on floor). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of red residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023

Salads and sandwiches packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023
The ice machine was not in good repair, with an accumulation of water observed on top of the machine. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023
The gaskets located in the walk-in cooler was not in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener base, and milk cooler 1 have an accumulation of soil residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023
The food prep sink is in poor repair, dripping water from the handles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2023
